name: Crab Stuffed Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Pound the chicken breasts between two sheets of waxed paper until very thin.
3. In a bowl, mix mayonnaise, seafood seasoning, crabmeat, parsley, bread crumbs, salt, and white pepper until combined.
4. Spoon the mixture onto one end of each chicken breast and roll tightly to enclose the filling.
5. Prick each breast with a fork to seal.
6. Coat each rolled breast in flour mixed with 1/2 cup flour, salt, and white pepper.
7. Dip each breast in the melted butter.
8. In another bowl, mix the remaining parsley with the bread crumbs.
9. Roll each coated breast in the bread crumb mixture.
10. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
11. Brown the chicken breasts all over for 2-3 minutes on each side.
12. Place the browned breasts on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes, or until cooked through and golden brown.
14. Serve hot.
